primary_sub_stage.name: Confidence and Over-Reliance on Past Success
primary_sub_stage.definition: Strong self-belief driven by prior achievements, assuming past strategies will continue to work without adaptation.

secondary_sub_stages.name: Initial Reality Check
secondary_sub_stages.definition: Early signs of friction and challenge are emerging, but confidence remains largely intact.

employee_questionnaire.question_text: You rely on past successes to navigate your current challenges.
You assume that what worked in the past will work in your current role without much adaptation.
You have recently encountered challenges that made you question your initial confidence.
You feel confident that you have all the skills and tools required for your current responsibilities.

strengths.description: Strong self-belief and decisiveness based on prior success.

weaknesses.description: Early warning signals may be rationalized rather than acted upon.

opportunities.description: Reality checks provide an opportunity to adapt before deeper issues form.

threats.description: Ignoring early signals may lead to sharper future corrections.

recommended_actions.recommendation: Actively list recent challenges and identify which assumptions they challenge.
